# uncertain

uncertain is a package for automating uncertainty of measurement
calculations. These calculations are used in the validation of genetic
laboratory tests to communicate the variability within an assay.

uncertain is currently under development.

## Installation

You can install the development version of uncertain from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("joe-m-shaw/uncertain")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`data_cnv`](https://joe-m-shaw.github.io/uncertain/reference/data_cnv.md)
  : Copy number variant repeat data
- [`data_snv`](https://joe-m-shaw.github.io/uncertain/reference/data_snv.md)
  : Single nucleotide variant repeat data
- [`group_stats()`](https://joe-m-shaw.github.io/uncertain/reference/group_stats.md)
  : Calculate statistical variation within groups
- [`pool_sd()`](https://joe-m-shaw.github.io/uncertain/reference/pool_sd.md)
  : Calculated pooled standard deviation
- [`sum_squares()`](https://joe-m-shaw.github.io/uncertain/reference/sum_squares.md)
  : Calculate the sum of squares

  variation](https://joe-m-shaw.github.io/uncertain/articles/assay-variation.md):
